caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, featuring an interview with a man seated inside a car. The man is being interviewed by a reporter holding a microphone with the ANI logo on it. He seems to be discussing political matters, as indicated by the text overlays in Hindi. The headlines suggest topics related to political alliances and statements made by individuals named Nitesh Kumar and Tejashwi. The man gestures with his hand while speaking, emphasizing his points. The background includes images of other political figures, further indicating the political nature of the discussion. The timestamp in the corner shows that the segment was broadcast at 10:04 PM.
